side_effects.description: Gradual reduction in efficacy of stimulant medications and blood pressure medications; blunted response to caffeine. On third dose, total shutdown of response to meds/drugs after 2 days, requiring cessation.

protocol_notes: Third time using BPC-157. Previous two times used injectable route. This time using oral pills. Notes that longer duration of use leads to longer-lasting blunting of medication effects after stopping. Stopped after 2 days on this cycle due to side effects.
